creator: andy@silverbrook.com.au
text:
When I had this problem and had a (very) brief debug session the panic
was occurring on a dereference of the parent pointer in the buffer. Are
there assumptions about completion ordering? (I didn't read the vinum
code so excuse me if this is a stupid question). Or is it just an
artifact
odd SCSI interaction?
--
Andy Newman, Principal Software Engineer, Silverbrook Research
